chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. S- 22 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.01.2016 1. For Orders on Office Objection 2. For Katcha Peshi Mr. Rashid Ali Ujjan, Advocate for petitioners Ch. Bashir Ahmed Asstt. A.G. a/w SIP Shafi Bangash for SSP Hyderabad and SIP Zahid Iqbal Chandio SHO PS A-Section, Latifabad, Hyderabad. The petitioners are aggrieved by the alleged harassment being caused to them by respondent No.4. SHO PS A-Section Latifabad, Hyderabad is present and states that no harassment has been caused to the petitioners and in fact no any FIR is registered against them so far. He further states that in any eventuality he would act in accordance with law. This statement has satisfied the counsel for petitioners who seeks disposal of this petition in the above terms. This petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE *Karar/-
